Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EmbeddedServiceLiveAgent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EmbeddedServiceLiveAgent
public class EmbeddedServiceLiveAgent extends Metadata

Java class for EmbeddedServiceLiveAgent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmbeddedServiceLiveAgent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="avatarImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="embeddedServiceQuickActions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceQuickAction" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="fontSize" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceFontSize"/>
         <element name="isOfflineCaseEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isQueuePositionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="liveAgentChatUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="liveAgentContentUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="liveChatButton" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="liveChatDeployment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="offlineCaseBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="prechatBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="prechatEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="prechatJson" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scenario" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmbeddedServiceScenario"/>
         <element name="smallCompanyLogoImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="waitingStateBackgroundImg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getEmbeddedServiceQuickActions

      public List<EmbeddedServiceQuickAction> getEmbeddedServiceQuickActions()
      Gets the value of the embeddedServiceQuickActions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the embeddedServiceQuickActions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmbeddedServiceQuickActions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmbeddedServiceQuickAction

      Returns:
      The value of the embeddedServiceQuickActions property.
